# mtncloud_security_group (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud security group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_security_group" "default" {
  name = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the security group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the security group is active.
- `description` (String) Description of the security group.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the security group.
